devices.title: Device Management
devices.description: Connected devices, authorization status, and blocked clients will be managed here.

shared.title: Shared Resources
shared.description: Desktop-local shared resources and access scopes will be configured here.

library.title: Library
library.description: Received assets, archive locations, and local library status will be summarized here.

records.title: Records
records.description: Connection, authorization, blocklist, and sync history will be available here.

account.dialogDescription: Sign in to use remote transfer.
account.logoutConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to sign out of the current account {{account}}? You will need to sign in again to use the sync features.

connectionSetup.title: Set pairing code
connectionSetup.downloadSectionTitle: Use and download the mobile app

download.title: Scan to download the mobile app
download.description: Scan the QR code on the right with your phone, then download and install the ViviDrop mobile app

pair.title: Enter pairing code
pair.description: Enter this pairing code on the phone to connect this computer. Photos and files sync automatically on the same LAN.

remoteAccess.title: Remotely access computer files
remoteAccess.description: After pairing succeeds, your phone can remotely access files on this computer

errorBoundary.helpLoadFailed: Help failed to load. Please retry.

sidecar.bonjourFallbackDetail: Bonjour for Windows was not detected on this Windows device.
sidecar.startingDetail: The desktop app is waiting for the local sidecar service to become ready.
sidecar.failedDetail: The local sidecar service could not start.

runtimeMessages.bonjourNativeDetected: Bonjour for Windows was detected and will be used for discovery.
runtimeMessages.bonjourFallbackDetected: Bonjour for Windows was not detected. The app is using the compatibility broadcaster.
runtimeMessages.starting: The local sidecar service is starting.
runtimeMessages.retrying: The local sidecar service is retrying startup.
runtimeMessages.startFailed: The local sidecar service failed to start.
runtimeMessages.exited: The local sidecar service exited unexpectedly.
runtimeMessages.healthCheckFailed: The local sidecar service did not pass its health check.
runtimeMessages.failedCheckExecutable: The background service failed to start. Check the packaged executable or diagnostics bundle.
